zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Englefield於大約1438年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾卡爾內時，她的父親Thomas Englefield20歲，母親Mary Margaret Clifton21歲。她於大約1460年與Robert Blake結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1501年在英國哈普爾素坦普頓享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Englefield于大约1438年出生在英国英格兰維爾爾卡爾內时，她的父亲Thomas Englefield20岁，母亲Mary Margaret Clifton21岁。她于大约1460年与Robert Blake结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1501年在英国哈普爾素坦普頓享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Englefield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from either of two places called Englefield (in Berks and Surrey).  Compare  Inglefield  .

variants.name: Inglefield
meanings: English: locative name from Englefield (Surrey), recorded as Ingelfeld in 1282, or Englefield (Berks).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Englefield was born about 1438, in Calne, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Englefield, was 20 and her mother, Mary Margaret Clifton, was 21. She married Robert Blake about 1460. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1501, in Southampton, Hampshire, England, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Englefield est née environ 1438, à Calne, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Englefield, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Mary Margaret Clifton, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Blake environ 1460. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1501, à Southampton, Hampshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Englefield um 1438 in Calne, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Englefield 20 und ihre Mutter Mary Margaret Clifton 21. Sie hat um 1460 Robert Blake geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1501 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Southampton, Hampshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Englefield è nata il circa 1438 nel Calne, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Englefield, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Mary Margaret Clifton, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Robert Blake circa 1460. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1501, nel Southampton, Hampshire, England, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Englefieldが約1438年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアカルンで生まれた時，父Thomas Englefieldは20歳，母Mary Margaret Cliftonは21歳であった。約1460年にRobert Blakeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1501年にイギリスハンプシュアイアソウサンプトンで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Englefield(이)가 대략 1438년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 캘니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Englefield(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Margaret Clifton(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1460년 Robert Blake(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1501년 영국 함프실르 소우섬프턴에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.
